scope.question: extraction_refresh: Aggregate adverse-event counts were extracted for the D+Q bone RCT, but event-specific adverse-event terms, discontinuation details, dosing cadence, and durability details remain incomplete across the human evidence slice.

inputs.summary: Coordinator job specification for the bounded senolytics safety-table extraction-refresh repair.
Repository operating rules for bounded extraction refresh, source-snapshot provenance, candidate ledgers, review lanes, and verification.

inputs.summary: Schemas used to shape the final agent-run output, candidate ledger, target coverage assessment, and scoped safety-extraction context.
Target coverage gap for event-specific adverse-event terms, discontinuation details, dosing cadence, durability, and cross-human safety extraction.
Triage state for the recommended self-healing coverage-gap job and related extraction debt.
Retained PMC author-manuscript source snapshot for the D+Q bone RCT full-text safety table and methods/discussion locators.
Full-text snapshot with normalized markdown and section index for PMID 38956196.
Retained ClinicalTrials.gov source snapshot for aggregate adverse-event counts through approximately 20 weeks.
Scoped D+Q bone safety records used to reconcile current extraction status and remaining safety-table debt.
Retained article markdown sections for Extended Data Table 1, safety/withdrawal narrative, D+Q dosing cadence, and durability discussion.

outputs.summary: Created the submitted coverage-gap repair candidate and updated the senolytics coverage assessment with source-snapshot-backed D+Q bone RCT safety-table, withdrawal, dosing-cadence, and durability locators. The extraction remains partial because structured event-term rows beyond headache and source-snapshot-backed safety extraction for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk studies remain open debt.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded extraction-refresh repair candidate and its required review lanes.
Refreshes the safety_durability category and senolytics-safety-tables gap with source-snapshot-backed D+Q bone safety locators and explicit remaining extraction debt.

blocking_issues: Structured event-specific adverse-event rows beyond the accepted headache row were not extracted in this bounded coverage-assessment repair; remaining D+Q bone table rows and discontinuation count fields still need row-level extraction.
No retained source/text snapshots for DKD, IPF, or AD-risk safety tables were supplied in the bounded job contract, so cross-human safety extraction remains incomplete.
next_actions: Move coverage-gap-senolytics-safety-tables-repair into review and run extraction_fidelity, safety_limitations, synthesis_boundary, and taxonomy_mapping lanes before promotion.
Create table-row extraction context packs for the remaining D+Q bone adverse-event terms and withdrawal/discontinuation details.
Ingest or retain source snapshots for DKD, IPF, and AD-risk safety extraction before any cross-human safety synthesis.
